What We Do

Our Services

Professional fence company solutions tailored to your needs.

Wood Fence Installation

Classic wood fences built to withstand Kansas City's weather.

Learn More →

Vinyl Fence Installation

Low-maintenance vinyl fences for lasting beauty and durability in Kansas City.

Learn More →

Chain Link Fence Installation

Affordable and secure chain link fences for residential and commercial properties.

Learn More →

Ornamental Metal Fence Installation

Elegant ornamental metal fences that add beauty and security to your property.

Learn More →

Fence Repair & Maintenance

Keep your fence in top condition with our expert repair and maintenance services.

Learn More →

Gate Installation & Repair

Secure and stylish gates for your fence, expertly installed and repaired.

Learn More →

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality fence company services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

We needed a new fence after a storm, and Residential Fence KC was fantastic. They quickly assessed the damage, gave us a fair quote, and installed a beautiful, sturdy wood fence. The crew was professional and cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

Sarah M.
★★★★★

Got a chain link fence installed for my dog run. The price was competitive, and the installation was quick. There was a small issue with the gate latch, but they came back the next day and fixed it right away. Good service.

John B.
★★★★

I love my new vinyl fence! It looks amazing and requires no maintenance. The Residential Fence KC team was very helpful in choosing the right style and color to match my house. The installation was seamless, and they were very respectful of my property.

Maria L.
★★★★★

My old wood fence was starting to fall apart. Residential Fence KC came out and repaired the damaged sections, stained the entire fence, and made it look brand new again. They saved me a lot of money compared to replacing the whole thing. Excellent work!

David K.
★★★★★

We had a new gate installed to secure our backyard, and the crew at Residential Fence KC was great. They were on time, professional, and the gate looks great. Installation was quick and clean. Would use again.

Emily R.
★★★★

From start to finish this company was top-notch. They did a great job removing our old, dilapidated fence and installing a brand new privacy fence. The crew was polite and professional. Would highly recommend them to anyone looking for fence work!

Robert S.
★★★★★

How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose Residential Fence KC llc

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How long will a wood fence last in Kansas City's climate?
With proper maintenance and quality materials, a wood fence can last 15-20 years in Kansas City. Pressure-treated lumber and regular staining are crucial for longevity.
What type of wood is best for fences in this area?
Pressure-treated pine is a cost-effective and durable option. Cedar is a naturally insect-resistant wood that provides a beautiful aesthetic.
Do I need a permit to build a wood fence in Kansas City?
Yes, most residential fence projects require a permit. We handle the permit acquisition process for you, ensuring compliance with local regulations.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Residential Fence KC llc.
